ddls:
CREATE TABLE "web_content_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., HTML, CSS, JavaScript, image, font) */,
  "header_size" TEXT /* Size of the HTTP header in bytes */,
  "transfer_size" TEXT /* Total size of transferred content in kilobytes */,
  "content_size" TEXT /* Size of the content in kilobytes */,
  "requests" INTEGER /* Number of requests made for this content type */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the associated web page */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tenant (department or team) */,
  "load_time" REAL /* Time taken to load the content in seconds */,
  "cache_status" TEXT /* Indicates whether the content was served from cache (e.g., 'cached', 'not_cached') */,
  "cdn_status" TEXT /* Indicates whether the content was served from a CDN (e.g., 'CDN', 'not_CDN') */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* Compression ratio of the content */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "web_page_metrics" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each web page entry */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the web page being monitored */,
  "monitoring_date" TEXT /* Date when the monitoring occurred */,
  "total_requests" INTEGER /* Total number of requests made for all content types on this page */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tenant (department or team) */,
  "page_load_time" REAL /* Total time taken to load the entire page in seconds */,
  "first_contentful_paint_time" REAL /* Time taken for the first piece of content to be painted on the screen in seconds */,
  "dom_content_loaded_time" REAL /* Time taken for the DOM content to be fully loaded in seconds */,
  "time_to_interactive" REAL /* Time taken for the page to become interactive in seconds */,
  "total_transfer_size" TEXT /* Total transfer size for all content types on the page in kilobytes */,
  "total_content_size" TEXT /* Total content size for all content types on the page in kilobytes */,
  "monitoring_time" TEXT /* Exact time when the monitoring occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenant */,
  "tenant_name" TEXT /* Name of the tenant (department or team) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tenant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tenant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id")
)
